description_long: This is a simple, rustic wooden fence composed of two horizontal rails supported by three vertical posts. The rails and posts have a slightly irregular, hand-hewn appearance, giving the fence a natural and unrefined look. The wood is uniformly colored in a medium brown, with no visible paint, stains, or decorative elements. The top edges of both the rails and posts are flat, and the posts extend slightly above the upper rail. There are no caps or finials on the posts, and the structure appears sturdy but lightweight, suitable for marking boundaries in parks, gardens, or along sidewalks. The overall design is utilitarian, with no gate or movable sections.
description: A rustic, medium-brown wooden fence with two horizontal rails and three flat-topped posts, featuring a simple, unadorned design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the fence, with two horizontal rails and three vertical posts clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the fence, with only the thickness of the posts and rails visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, again showing the two rails and three posts, with no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim edge of the fence structure.
